site.title: Cachicamo Studios – Content, Ideas & Technology
site.description: A creative studio for digital production and technology. YouTube, Web3, blogs and branding with a global vision.

services.title: services
services.p1: we make digital content and YouTube: video production, channel strategy and editing for creators and brands that want to build real audiences. we also work in Web3, NFTs and emerging technologies, from consulting to producing projects across blockchain and the digital economy.
services.p2: we create and run blogs and digital media: newsletters, communities and publications with a voice of their own. we design visual identity and branding with a global vision: design systems, brand communication and creativity applied to projects that need to stand out.
services.p3: we explore and integrate artificial intelligence: AI tools, workflows and applications to power creative and business projects. and when teams need direction, we offer tech consulting and innovation: strategic guidance to scale in digital without losing the creative compass.

about.title: about
about.p1: Cachicamo Studios is a digital creative lab born to build digital projects with an identity of their own. We produce content, develop brands and explore technology. Our work spans multiple platforms and formats: YouTube, blogs, Web3, AI and branding, driven by the conviction that the internet can be a more creative and diverse place.
about.p2: We work with small teams and big ambitions. We believe in honest collaboration, in ideas that push a little, and in technology — including artificial intelligence — as a tool to drive processes and workflows that ensure independence, scalability, exponential growth and standardization.

contact.title: contact
contact.bookingDesc: have a project in mind? let's schedule a 30-minute call to get to know each other and explore how we can help.

web.metaDescription: Professional web development: personal sites, branding and apps. No templates, just work made with intention.
manifesto: A website isn't just a URL.
It's your presence. Your statement. The space that represents you online.
Personal, branding and professional sites. No templates. No shortcuts. Just work made with intention.

form.successSub: Check your email — we received your project details and will get in touch to schedule a meeting.
form.descripcionPlaceholder: What do you have in mind?
form.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.

ia.metaDescription: A directory of artificial intelligence projects built by cachicamo studios.
ia.sub: A directory of artificial intelligence projects built at cachicamo studios to connect people with tools that actually work.

projects.name: app.cachicamo.studio
projects.description: App dedicated to building the pre-production and production workflow for shoots and filming.

projects.name: app.elgritcast.com
projects.description: AI motivational coach trained on El Grit Cast content. Real-time conversations about resilience, mindset and entrepreneurship.

projects.name: Fintech Bot
projects.description: Bot that automatically generates and publishes posts on Mastodon. AI-driven financial content curation and hands-off distribution.

projects.name: Neuro Bot
projects.description: Bot that automatically posts content about neuroscience applied to grit on Mastodon. Habits, resilience and mindset backed by science.

projects.name: IA Pets
projects.description: Desktop pets with built-in AI. Virtual pets on your desktop that act as conversational assistants, with their own personality and contextual memory.

projects.name: Fintech News Agent
projects.description: Local agent that automatically finds and curates financial news and posts it to Telegram. Runs on a MacBook Air with Groq for ultra-light inference.

projects.name: Ñam Bot
projects.description: Local agent that finds food news and events and posts them to Telegram. Runs on a MacBook Air with Groq for ultra-light inference.

projects.name: 3zkMC Minecraft Updates
projects.description: Local agent that tracks Minecraft news and updates — the best-selling game of all time — and posts them automatically to Telegram via Groq.

projects.name: Motion Graphics Generator
projects.description: Remotion pipeline that generates motion graphics for YouTube: animated mind maps and emphasis phrases for the 3zkMC and Susana Resiste channels.

projects.name: El Grit Cast News
projects.description: Local agent that tracks scientific research and news about grit, resilience and growth mindset. Posts daily updates to Telegram via Groq.

blog.metaDescription: Ideas, processes and reflections on digital content, technology and creativity.
